summary: Comprehensive testing completed for HSBC MX Transaction Platform Transaction Detail page redesign. All 4 document tabs (MT202 COV, PACS.008, MT103 ACK, Debit Note) are working correctly with proper HSBC Germany branding. Backend APIs maintaining 100% success rate. All frontend functionality including login, navigation, tab switching, and action buttons working perfectly.
passed_tests: Navigation from dashboard to transactions list
Navigation from transactions list to transaction detail
All 4 tabs present and clickable: MT202 COV, PACS.008, MT103 ACK, Debit Note
MT202 COV tab displays SWIFT format with Sequence A and B sections
PACS.008 tab shows ISO 20022 XML message structure
MT103 ACK tab displays TARGET2 acknowledgment with processing timestamps
Debit Note tab shows official debit note with proper sections
HSBC Germany branding correctly displayed across all tabs (5-11 mentions per tab)
No Deutsche Bank branding found (0 mentions across all tabs)
Export PDF button visible and functional
Back navigation button returns to transactions list
All document headers show proper SWIFT formatting
Barcode and QR code components present
All backend API endpoints working (100% success rate from previous test)
